        print(f"Blue object: id={n['id']}, px={n['pixels']}, bounds=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

# Try clicking on the gap in top shape
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 16, 'col': 31}])
